commit_title: Add subplot side menu and multi-plot support
commit_message: Introduce subplot/grid support and a Subplots side menu. Adds a new SubplotSideMenu component and a persisted SubplotSideMenuStore to assign traces to 1..4 subplot cells (rows/cols up to 2x2). Integrates the store into WorkspaceContext and persistence/cleanup in WorkspaceStore. PlotArea now reads the subplot store and passes subplot data into generatePlotConfig. generatePlotConfig was updated to duplicate traces per assigned subplot, emit x/y axis keys (x, x2, y, y2...), inject layout.grid and per-subplot axis configs, and update the generated Plotly receipt to reflect subplot axes and trace assignments. UI changes in SideMenu add a "Subplots" tab and wiring to render the new menu. Default behavior preserves single-plot behavior when grid is 1x1 and falls back to subplot 1 if no explicit assignment exists.
